arts.ttl: Chelsea confirm injury blow with forward out for two months
arts.sum: Chelsea have confirmed that Nicolas Jackson is set for up to two months on the sidelines through injury. The 23-year-old was substituted against West Ham two weeks ago with a hamstring injury and scans have since revealed the extent of the issue.
